params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui
params.note_text: Final beat 01 deliverable. Preserve the oppressive cold boundary and the off-center stack silhouette.
params.accent_palette: winter blue, off-white, charcoal, signal orange
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the launch stack outside the subtitle band and preserve the top UI band as empty field
params.signal_anchor: iced launch stack under a crushing cold field
params.historical_anchor: Challenger launch stack and iced gantry steel on the freezing launch morning
params.surreal_breach: the cold boundary presses into the frame as if it were a physical wall

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: Challenger launch stack reduced to a severe vertical silhouette against winter air
support_fragments: iced gantry steel and brittle pad vapor kept subordinate to the stack read
one charged orange seam of warning kept small inside a vast cold field
directives: keep the stack off-center and mobile-legible
